login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your workspace email and password.
login.forgotPasswordHint: We will email you a secure link to reset it.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email. If an account exists with a password, we will send a reset link.
forgotPassword.backToLoginHint: Remember your password? Go back and sign in.

setPassword.inviteDescription: Review the invite details below and create a strong password to access your clinic workspace.
setPassword.resetDescription: Choose a strong new password. You will use it on your next sign-in.
